 {"id":"bd-d2o1j","title":"CONFORMANCE: libc pwd.h+grp.h diff matrix","description":"Differential harness shipped in commit 5f0108bb. 5 functions (getpwuid/getpwnam/getgrgid/getgrnam/getpwnam_r). -{"id":"bd-d5f7u","title":"PORT: 18 libbsd-parity stubs (9 MD5* BSD-style + __fdnlist + 8 _time_to_* converters)","description":"Add 18 libbsd-parity stubs that close the remaining libbsd surface gap. (1) MD5Init / MD5Update / MD5Final / MD5Transform / MD5Pad — BSD-style streaming MD5 API operating on an MD5_CTX struct, mapped to the md-5 crate Md5 streaming digest. (2) MD5Data — one-shot: hash a buffer to digest. (3) MD5End — finish + emit hex into caller buffer. (4) MD5File / MD5FileChunk — hash file contents (or a range) and emit hex. (5) __fdnlist(int fd) — GLIBC_PRIVATE NIS+/libnsl helper that runs nlist by fd; stub returns -1 (not supported) which matches the on-disk-symbol-table-not-loaded path. (6) _int_to_time / _long_to_time / _time32_to_time / _time64_to_time / _time_to_int / _time_to_long / _time_to_time32 / _time_to_time64 — NetBSD time(_t) <-> integer width converter inlines lifted to ABI calls (identity on LP64 since time_t == long == int64 == time64).","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-04-26T20:33:17.926268064Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-26T20:33:17.926268064Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
+{"id":"bd-d5f7u","title":"PORT: 18 libbsd-parity stubs (9 MD5* BSD-style + __fdnlist + 8 _time_to_* converters)","description":"Add 18 libbsd-parity stubs that close the remaining libbsd surface gap. (1) MD5Init / MD5Update / MD5Final / MD5Transform / MD5Pad — BSD-style streaming MD5 API operating on an MD5_CTX struct, mapped to the md-5 crate Md5 streaming digest. (2) MD5Data — one-shot: hash a buffer to digest. (3) MD5End — finish + emit hex into caller buffer. (4) MD5File / MD5FileChunk — hash file contents (or a range) and emit hex. (5) __fdnlist(int fd) — GLIBC_PRIVATE NIS+/libnsl helper that runs nlist by fd; stub returns -1 (not supported) which matches the on-disk-symbol-table-not-loaded path. (6) _int_to_time / _long_to_time / _time32_to_time / _time64_to_time / _time_to_int / _time_to_long / _time_to_time32 / _time_to_time64 — NetBSD time(_t) <-> integer width converter inlines lifted to ABI calls (identity on LP64 since time_t == long == int64 == time64).","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-04-26T20:33:17.926268064Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-26T20:38:44.687609027Z","closed_at":"2026-04-26T20:38:44.685588198Z","close_reason":"shipped: 18 libbsd-parity stubs (MD5*+__fdnlist+8 time_t converters) + 11 abi tests","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-d5ji","title":"syscall: sched_rr_get_interval nonexistent pid with valid output should return ESRCH exactly","description":"Host glibc returns ESRCH for sched_rr_get_interval(huge_nonexistent_pid, &timespec). Add focused ABI regression coverage so the nonexistent-pid contract is explicit.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T08:49:26.236454025Z","created_by":"AmberSignal","updated_at":"2026-04-22T01:57:28.493228016Z","closed_at":"2026-04-22T01:57:28.491040635Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-d5l","title":"Perf: Microbench RuntimeMathKernel::decide/observe (criterion + ns/op)","description":"Create a repeatable benchmark that measures runtime_math overhead directly.

Acceptance criteria:
- Bench measures decide() and observe_validation_result() separately and together.
- Reports p50/p95/p99 ns/op and throughput.
- Produces stable output suitable for regression gating.

Implementation notes:
- Keep benchmark deterministic: fixed inputs, fixed warmup, pin thread if needed.
- Include both strict and hardened mode paths.
- Record compiler flags / CPU model in output metadata.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"BlueLake","created_at":"2026-02-09T21:30:56.703138634Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-10T02:10:24.254231420Z","closed_at":"2026-02-10T02:10:24.254213887Z","close_reason":"bench implemented","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"comments":[{"id":1081,"issue_id":"bd-d5l","author":"BlueLake","text":"Implemented criterion microbench  (decide / observe_validation_result / decide+observe) in  and wired it in .

How to run:
- Strict: RUNTIME_MATH_BENCH_META glibc_rust_mode_env=strict
RUNTIME_MATH_BENCH_META rustflags=<unset>
RUNTIME_MATH_BENCH_META cpu_model=: AMD Ryzen Threadripper PRO 5995WX 64-Cores
runtime_math/decide/strict
                        time:   [1.0968 µs 1.1060 µs 1.1172 µs]
                        thrpt:  [895.13 Kelem/s 904.19 Kelem/s 911.75 Kelem/s]
                 change:
                        time:   [-1.9912% +0.0240% +2.0613%] (p = 0.99 > 0.05)
                        thrpt:  [-2.0197% -0.0240% +2.0316%]
                        No change in performance detected.
Found 16 outliers among 100 measurements (16.00%)
  2 (2.00%) high mild
  14 (14.00%) high severe

RUNTIME_MATH_BENCH mode=strict bench=decide samples=110 p50_ns_op=1093.831 p95_ns_op=1637.438 p99_ns_op=1727.887 mean_ns_op=1186.927 throughput_ops_s=901560.862
runtime_math/observe_fast/strict
                        time:   [3.4119 µs 3.4687 µs 3.5429 µs]
                        thrpt:  [282.25 Kelem/s 288.29 Kelem/s 293.09 Kelem/s]
                 change:
                        time:   [-5.3607% -0.0676% +5.4778%] (p = 0.98 > 0.05)
                        thrpt:  [-5.1934% +0.0677% +5.6644%]
                        No change in performance detected.
Found 7 outliers among 100 measurements (7.00%)
  7 (7.00%) high mild

RUNTIME_MATH_BENCH mode=strict bench=observe_fast samples=108 p50_ns_op=3539.561 p95_ns_op=5505.000 p99_ns_op=6209.688 mean_ns_op=3984.990 throughput_ops_s=282152.298
runtime_math/decide_observe/strict
                        time:   [2.7311 µs 2.7536 µs 2.7813 µs]
                        thrpt:  [359.54 Kelem/s 363.16 Kelem/s 366.15 Kelem/s]
                 change:
                        time:   [-16.076% -13.607% -11.118%] (p = 0.00 < 0.05)
                        thrpt:  [+12.509% +15.751% +19.156%]
                        Performance has improved.
Found 9 outliers among 100 measurements (9.00%)
  7 (7.00%) high mild
  2 (2.00%) high severe

RUNTIME_MATH_BENCH mode=strict bench=decide_observe samples=109 p50_ns_op=2766.755 p95_ns_op=3600.642 p99_ns_op=3988.336 mean_ns_op=2900.411 throughput_ops_s=361242.763
- Hardened: RUNTIME_MATH_BENCH_META glibc_rust_mode_env=hardened
RUNTIME_MATH_BENCH_META rustflags=<unset>
RUNTIME_MATH_BENCH_META cpu_model=: AMD Ryzen Threadripper PRO 5995WX 64-Cores
runtime_math/decide/hardened
                        time:   [950.45 ns 956.86 ns 964.71 ns]
                        thrpt:  [1.0366 Melem/s 1.0451 Melem/s 1.0521 Melem/s]
Found 8 outliers among 100 measurements (8.00%)
  6 (6.00%) high mild
  2 (2.00%) high severe

RUNTIME_MATH_BENCH mode=hardened bench=decide samples=111 p50_ns_op=946.522 p95_ns_op=1015.690 p99_ns_op=1053.307 mean_ns_op=955.131 throughput_ops_s=1044978.944
runtime_math/observe_fast/hardened
                        time:   [3.3547 µs 3.3778 µs 3.4073 µs]
                        thrpt:  [293.49 Kelem/s 296.05 Kelem/s 298.09 Kelem/s]
Found 12 outliers among 100 measurements (12.00%)
  12 (12.00%) high mild

RUNTIME_MATH_BENCH mode=hardened bench=observe_fast samples=108 p50_ns_op=3453.237 p95_ns_op=5449.906 p99_ns_op=5991.000 mean_ns_op=3873.269 throughput_ops_s=289938.314
runtime_math/decide_observe/hardened
                        time:   [4.3028 µs 4.5118 µs 4.7518 µs]
                        thrpt:  [210.44 Kelem/s 221.64 Kelem/s 232.41 Kelem/s]
Found 5 outliers among 100 measurements (5.00%)
  5 (5.00%) high mild

RUNTIME_MATH_BENCH mode=hardened bench=decide_observe samples=108 p50_ns_op=4354.797 p95_ns_op=6938.384 p99_ns_op=8046.975 mean_ns_op=4767.682 throughput_ops_s=218937.764

Output:
- Prints  (env mode, RUSTFLAGS, /proc/cpuinfo model).
- Prints  per benchmark.

Determinism knobs:
- Fixed inputs (pointer_validation ctx).
- Fixed warmup loops (10k iters) before measurement.
- Optional Linux CPU pinning via .","created_at":"2026-02-10T02:09:18Z"},{"id":1082,"issue_id":"bd-d5l","author":"BlueLake","text":"NOTE: Previous comment accidentally expanded benchmark output due to shell backticks; ignore it for instructions.

What changed:
- Added crates/glibc-rs-bench/benches/runtime_math_bench.rs
- Added [[bench]] runtime_math_bench entry in crates/glibc-rs-bench/Cargo.toml

Bench targets:
- runtime_math/decide/<mode>
- runtime_math/observe_fast/<mode>
- runtime_math/decide_observe/<mode>

How to run:
- Strict: GLIBC_RUST_MODE=strict cargo bench -p glibc-rs-bench --bench runtime_math_bench
- Hardened: GLIBC_RUST_MODE=hardened cargo bench -p glibc-rs-bench --bench runtime_math_bench

Output:
- RUNTIME_MATH_BENCH_META lines (env mode, RUSTFLAGS, CPU model)
- RUNTIME_MATH_BENCH lines with p50/p95/p99/mean ns/op and throughput ops/s

Determinism:
- fixed inputs (pointer_validation ctx)
- fixed warmup loops (10k iters)
- optional Linux CPU pinning: GLIBC_RUST_BENCH_PIN=1","created_at":"2026-02-10T02:10:05Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-d8us8","title":"PORT: __b64_ntop + __b64_pton (RFC 4648 base64 from BIND/libresolv)","description":"BIND/libresolv exposes __b64_ntop(src, srclength, target, targsize) and __b64_pton(src, target, targsize) — RFC 4648 base64 encode/decode used by name servers, DNSSEC tools, and programs that link against libresolv. Distinct from existing System V (a64l/l64a) and crypt(3) base64 modules: standard MIME alphabet (A-Z a-z 0-9 + /) with = padding, big-endian bit packing. Currently missing entirely from frankenlibc-abi (no b64_ntop/b64_pton/__b64_ntop/__b64_pton symbols). Ship a new core::resolv::b64 module (encode/decode pure-byte) plus 4 abi shims (b64_ntop, b64_pton, and the leading-underscore aliases __b64_ntop/__b64_pton that libresolv actually exports).","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-04-25T15:22:29.270258169Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T15:28:18.197693080Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T15:28:18.195790239Z","close_reason":"shipped: core::resolv::b64 (RFC 4648 ntop/pton) + glibc_internal_abi b64_ntop/b64_pton/__b64_ntop/__b64_pton; 17+12 tests; clippy-clean","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
